executive_summary: Build failure analysis for scib_new repository on main branch. Latest attempt (#2) failed due to GitHub Actions workflow dispatch error (HTTP 500). This is a configuration/infrastructure issue preventing the build from starting, not a Maven compilation error.

errors.error_message: HTTP Error 500: Internal Server Error. Failed to run workflow dispatch
errors.root_cause: GitHub Actions API returned 500 Internal Server Error when attempting to dispatch the build workflow. This indicates a server-side issue with GitHub Actions or a misconfiguration in the workflow dispatch request.
errors.impact: Build cannot be initiated. All build attempts are failing at the dispatch stage before any Maven compilation or testing can occur.

automated_actions: Validate repository permissions and GitHub Actions settings
Check for GitHub Actions service status
manual_steps: Review GitHub Actions workflow file for syntax errors
Ensure repository has Actions enabled in settings
Verify authentication tokens have correct permissions
Check GitHub Status page for service disruptions
Review workflow dispatch inputs and configuration

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Error detected in build attempt #2 at workflow dispatch stage

next_steps: Once workflow dispatch is fixed, re-run build to identify any Maven-specific errors

compliance_audit.error_classification_method: Automated log analysis with manual validation
